creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Laurent Daverio from comment #0)
I suggest you report this to gitlab as an issue.
Descripe it well with full error message.

You should get there an answer.

If you followed my manual:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/update/16.6-16.7-freebsd.md?ref_type=heads

carefully, I cannot help you further, as that goes then very deep into gitlab itself.

I know problems with the migration and I documented them also in my manual but your error message does not match it or you just posted to less of the output.
